title: Role-Based Access Control: How to Build an RBAC App with AI
summary: Tutorial demonstrating how to build a role-based access control event management application using Softr's AI Co-Builder. The video covers database structure generation, workflow automations, and permissions management without requiring multiple AI prompts, positioning Softr against competitors like Lovable and Replit.
